prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan **CA18DET** (1.8L turbocharged inline-4, 170-205hp stock) with forged internals: **JE 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **Nissan Motorsports (Nismo) crankshaft** for 8,500 RPM redline capability. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 60-trim compressor, 76-trim turbine) for 320-350whp on E85 fuel.

Full **HKS 264°/264° camshafts** (lift: 8.5mm intake, 8.2mm exhaust) with **Tomei adjustable cam gears** and **Jun 1.5mm head gasket** for optimized airflow. **N1 oil pump** and **Nismo 740cc injectors** with **Apexi Power FC** standalone ECU for precise fuel mapping and boost control (1.2-1.4 bar peak).

Drivetrain reinforcement: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 4.11 final drive) with **Nismo 5-speed close-ratio transmission (R32 GT-R syncros)** and **PPG carbon-fiber driveshaft**. **Cusco 8-point bolt-in roll cage** with **Nismo 4.11 R200 differential** for durability under high torque loads.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Langley-specific widebody kit** (front fenders + rear quarter panels, 30mm wider track) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 50% weight reduction) and **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (3D carbon, 1,200mm span, adjustable angle).

**Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +15 ET wheels** (5x114.3, 225/45/15 Yokohama AD08R tires) with **BC Racing BR coilovers** (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear, 30-way damping adjustability) and **Cusco front strut bar** for chassis rigidity.

**Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats** (FIA-approved, 6-point harnesses) with **Nismo 320mm steering wheel** (suede, quick-release hub) and **Defi BF gauges** (oil temp, boost, wideband AFR) mounted on a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**. **Full interior strip** (sound deadening removed, replaced with **Dynamat Xtreme** for weight savings).
